fried chicken burger: Spices (e.g., garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, black pepper)
crispy chicken burger: Chicken meat (as the core of the patty)
Breading (flour, breadcrumbs, spices, eggs for the patty)
Salt (general seasoning, in bun, patty, sauce, pickles)
Garlic powder (possible seasoning in patty or sauce)
Onion powder (possible seasoning in patty or sauce)
